name: HALLERVORDEN-SPATZ DISEASE
definition: PANTOTHENATE KINASE-ASSOCIATED NEURODEGENERATION rare familial neurodegenerative metabolic disorder with abnormal iron retention in basal

demographics.Histo: hyperpigmentation and symmetrical destruction of globus pallidus + substantia nigra

dominant_finding: low- (= tissue destruction) / high-density (= dystrophic calcification) foci in globus
distribution: initially bilateral hypointense globus pallidus on T2WI (= iron accumulation)
discriminating_features: low- (= tissue destruction) / high-density (= dystrophic calcification) foci in globus
"eye-of-the-tiger" sign = high-signal-intensity center surrounded by the more typical
initially bilateral hypointense globus pallidus on T2WI (= iron accumulation)
later central hyperintense foci on T2WI (= tissue destruction + gliosis)

CT: low- (= tissue destruction) / high-density (= dystrophic calcification) foci in globus
MR: "eye-of-the-tiger" sign = high-signal-intensity center surrounded by the more typical
initially bilateral hypointense globus pallidus on T2WI (= iron accumulation)
later central hyperintense foci on T2WI (= tissue destruction + gliosis)
